items.title_en: The best states for workers to get educated, trained and find a job in America in 2026
items.title_zh: 2026 年最适合工人在美国接受教育、培训和找到工作的州
items.desc_en: These 11 U.S. states excel when it comes to the education level of their workforce, migration patterns, and workforce development programs.
items.desc_zh: 美国这 11 个州在劳动力教育水平、移民模式和劳动力发展计划方面表现出色。

items.title_en: S&P 500 tries to fight higher on solid earnings, but chip stocks are weighing on market again: Live updates
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数试图凭借稳健的盈利而走高，但芯片股再次给市场带来压力：实时更新
items.desc_en: Stocks were bolstered by solid earnings to start the season even as they were weighed down by a slide in semiconductors.
items.desc_zh: 尽管受到半导体下滑的拖累，股市在本季度伊始就受到了强劲盈利的提振。

items.title_en: This retailer on Josh Brown's Best Stocks list continues rising while its biggest rival falls
items.title_zh: 乔什·布朗最佳股票名单上的这家零售商继续上涨，而其最大竞争对手却下跌
items.desc_en: Josh Brown and Sean Russo take a look at this retail name that's outperforming.
items.desc_zh: 乔什·布朗（Josh Brown）和肖恩·罗素（Sean Russo）考察了这个表现出色的零售品牌。

items.title_en: Truth Social launches service to give Wall Street traders an edge with real-time service
items.title_zh: Truth Social 推出服务，为华尔街交易者提供实时服务优势
items.desc_en: Trump Media launched an API to give paying customers real-time access to market-moving Truth Social posts.
items.desc_zh: Trump Media 推出了一个 API，让付费客户可以实时访问影响市场的 Truth Social 帖子。

items.title_en: Short sellers load up against SpaceX as stock retreats back to IPO price
items.title_zh: 随着 SpaceX 股价回落至 IPO 价格，卖空者纷纷买入
items.desc_en: About 185 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 29% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.
items.desc_zh: 据 S3 称，目前约有 1.85 亿股 SpaceX 股票被卖空，约占该公司可公开交易流通股的 29%。

items.title_en: Buy the dip on this drone stock set for big gains ahead, says Raymond James
items.title_zh: 雷蒙德·詹姆斯表示，逢低买入这只无人机股票，未来有望大幅上涨
items.desc_en: The firm upgraded the drone maker to outperform from market perform.
items.desc_zh: 该公司将这家无人机制造商的评级升级为跑赢大市。

items.title_en: Sen. Warren says Trump's CFPB overhaul has cost Americans $26.5 billion
items.title_zh: 沃伦参议员表示，特朗普的 CFPB 改革让美国人损失了 265 亿美元
items.desc_en: Sen. Elizabeth Warren says the Trump administration's rollback of CFPB rules and enforcement has cost Americans up to $26.5 billion so far.
items.desc_zh: 参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦 (Elizabeth Warren) 表示，特朗普政府取消 CFPB 规则和执行，迄今为止已给美国人造成高达 265 亿美元的损失。

items.title_en: Banking Committee's Sen. Rounds liked Warsh's 'tone' in first testimony as Fed chairman
items.title_zh: 银行委员会参议员朗兹喜欢沃什作为美联储主席首次作证时的“语气”
items.desc_en: Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh was on Capitol Hill for two days of testimony this week.
items.desc_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什本周在国会山进行了为期两天的证词。

items.title_en: Hundreds protest in Kyiv over Zelenskyy’s dismissal of defence minister - Al Jazeera

items.title_en: Teenager accused of carrying out sabotage actions in Poland for Russia
items.title_zh: 青少年被指控在波兰为俄罗斯进行破坏活动
items.desc_en: Polish security services say the aim was to incite ethnic tensions between Poland and Ukraine.
items.desc_zh: 波兰安全部门表示，此举的目的是煽动波兰和乌克兰之间的种族紧张关系。

items.title_en: Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43
items.title_zh: 意大利官员因热那亚桥梁灾难致43人死亡被判入狱
items.desc_en: The ex-head of Italy's motorway operator Giovanni Castellucci was handed a 12-year term over the 2018 bridge collapse.
items.desc_zh: 意大利高速公路运营商前负责人乔瓦尼·卡斯特鲁奇 (Giovanni Castellucci) 因 2018 年桥梁垮塌事件而被判处 12 年任期。

items.title_en: Nvidia-backed Fireworks hits $17.5 billion valuation as companies pursue cheaper AI models
items.title_zh: 随着公司追求更便宜的人工智能模型，Nvidia支持的Fireworks估值达到175亿美元
items.desc_en: Fireworks once relied heavily on revenue from coding startup Cursor, but has diversified in the past year as more companies reach for lower-cost AI models.
items.desc_zh: Fireworks 曾经严重依赖编码初创公司 Cursor 的收入，但随着越来越多的公司寻求更低成本的人工智能模型，Fireworks 在过去一年中实现了多元化。

items.title_en: Volunteer firefighter suspected of starting devastating France forest fire
items.title_zh: 志愿消防员涉嫌引发毁灭性的法国森林火灾
items.desc_en: President Macron said there would be no leniency for arsonists, as France - along with much of Europe - deals with a series of unusual heatwaves.
items.desc_zh: 马克龙总统表示，法国和欧洲大部分地区正在应对一系列不寻常的热浪，因此对纵火犯不会手下留情。

items.title_en: Protests in Ukraine's cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
items.title_zh: 乌克兰各城市举行抗议活动，抗议泽连斯基罢免国防部长
items.desc_en: Ukraine's president has not explained Mykhailo Fedorov's dismissal, which is causing great upset among civil society and the military.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰总统没有解释米哈伊洛·费多罗夫被解职的原因，这引起了民间社会和军方的极大不满。

items.title_zh: 英伟达推出新的人工智能模型并扩展日本的物理人工智能生态系统

items.title_zh: 加纳身份证欺诈行动强制要求进行数字检查——禁止复印
items.desc_en: Companies are now required to verify a person's identity electronically to curb theft and forgery.
items.desc_zh: 公司现在需要以电子方式验证个人身份，以遏制盗窃和伪造行为。

items.title_zh: 乌干达最后一名埃博拉患者出院，“欢乐时刻”
items.desc_en: Most of the recent cases were among travellers from the Democratic Republic of Congo.
items.desc_zh: 最近的大多数病例都是来自刚果民主共和国的旅行者。

items.title_zh: 由于购物者购买的商品减少，美国食品杂货销售放缓加剧，给食品公司带来压力
items.desc_en: New data show the U.S. grocery slowdown is deepening as shoppers buy fewer items, forcing grocers and brands to compete harder on price and value.
items.desc_zh: 新数据显示，随着购物者购买的商品减少，美国食品杂货销售放缓正在加剧，迫使食品杂货商和品牌在价格和价值上更加激烈地竞争。

items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱

items.title_zh: 联合健康集团控制成本，超出预期并上调盈利前景

items.title_en: New monkey species with orange lips found 'hiding' in DRC forest
items.title_zh: 刚果森林中发现“隐藏”的橙色嘴唇新猴种
items.desc_en: Scientists describe "amazing feeling" to look into the face of an animal that so few people knew existed.
items.desc_zh: 科学家们形容，看到一种很少有人知道其存在的动物的脸时会有“奇妙的感觉”。

items.title_en: Deadly boat capsize on San Francisco Bay: Family had gathered to scatter loved one’s ashes - San Francisco Chronicle

items.desc_en: Deadly boat capsize on San Francisco Bay: Family had gathered to scatter loved one’s ashes  San Francisco ChronicleBoat capsized in San Francisco Bay is from Stockton, officials say  KCRABoat That San
items.desc_zh: 旧金山湾致命的船只倾覆：家人聚集在一起撒撒亲人的骨灰 旧金山纪事报 官员称，旧金山湾倾覆的船只来自斯托克顿

items.title_en: US military to start testosterone  testing, Hegseth says
items.title_zh: 赫格斯说，美国军方将开始睾酮测试
items.desc_en: "We owe our warriors the absolute best medical care in the world, and this program delivers on that obligation," Hegseth said in a video.
items.desc_zh: 赫格斯在视频中表示：“我们应该为我们的战士提供世界上绝对最好的医疗服务，而这个计划履行了这一义务。”

items.title_en: Argentina face fine for Falklands banner in semi-final win
items.title_zh: 阿根廷在半决赛中因福克兰群岛旗帜而面临罚款
items.desc_en: Argentina face the prospect of a Fifa fine after their players celebrated the World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.
items.desc_zh: 阿根廷队球员在世界杯半决赛战胜英格兰队时举起支持阿根廷对福克兰群岛主权的横幅庆祝，因此面临国际足联的罚款。

items.title_en: Analysis: Fed Chairman Warsh faces an inflation credibility test after Congress hearings
items.title_zh: 分析：国会听证会后美联储主席沃什面临通胀可信度考验
items.desc_en: The new Fed chairman avoided major stumbles in two days of testimony before the House and Senate, but faces a rapid test of his commitment to price stability.
items.desc_zh: 这位新任美联储主席在众议院和参议院两天的证词中避免了重大失误，但他对价格稳定的承诺面临着快速考验。

items.desc_zh: 美国智库的调查显示，人们对习近平的信心比对唐纳德·特朗普的信心更高。

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.title_en: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.title_zh: 根据 Ofcom 的提议，大型科技公司必须处理诈骗广告
items.desc_en: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。

items.title_en: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
items.title_zh: “90秒制冷”——假冒移动空调席卷网络
items.desc_en: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。

items.title_en: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
items.title_zh: 欧洲最大港口面临更加环保的压力
items.desc_en: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.
items.desc_zh: 一项诉讼要求鹿特丹港加快行动，减少对化石燃料公司的依赖。

items.title_en: Porn site company fined £630,000 over failed age checks
items.title_zh: 色情网站公司因未通过年龄检查被罚款 63 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom has fined a slew of sites it says are failing to prevent children accessing their adult content.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 对大量网站进行了罚款，称其未能阻止儿童访问其成人内容。
